zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisèle de GUÎNES於1077年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯時，她的父親Baudouin de Guînes39歲，母親Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande32歲。她於1106年與Weinemar de GAND在比利時福拉安德倫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1120年在法國巴-諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisèle de GUÎNES于1077年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯时，她的父亲Baudouin de Guînes39岁，母亲Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande32岁。她于1106年与Weinemar de GAND在比利时福拉安德倫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1120年在法国巴-諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: GUÎNES
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Gisèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisella
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. en.lifeSummary: When Gisèle de GUÎNES was born in 1077, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Baudouin de Guînes, was 39 and her mother, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, was 32. She married Weinemar de GAND in 1106, in Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1120, in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisèle de GUÎNES est née en 1077, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Baudouin de Guînes, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Weinemar de GAND en 1106, à Flandre, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1120, à Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisèle de GUÎNES 1077 in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin de Guînes 39 und ihre Mutter Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande 32. Sie hat 1106 in Vlaanderen, Belgien Weinemar de GAND geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1120 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle de GUÎNES è nata il nel 1077 nel Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Baudouin de Guînes, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Weinemar de GAND nel 1106, nel Vlaanderen, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1120, nel Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gisèle de GUÎNESが1077年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Baudouin de Guînesは39歳，母Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollandeは32歳であった。1106年にベルギーvラアンデレンでWeinemar de GANDと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1120年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンモータグネ-アウ-ペルチェで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gisèle de GUÎNES(이)가 1077년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin de Guînes(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1106년 벨기에 블라아더에서 Weinemar de GAND(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1120년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 모르타그니-오-퍼체에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle de GUÎNES nasceu em 1077, em Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Baudouin de Guînes, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Weinemar de GAND em 1106, em Vlaanderen, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1120, em Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisèle de GUÎNES родилась в 1077 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Baudouin de Guînes было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Weinemar de GAND в 1106 г. в местности влаандирен, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1120 г. в местности мортагне-ау-пирч, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gisèle de GUÎNES nació en 1077, en Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Baudouin de Guînes, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Weinemar de GAND en 1106, en Vlaanderen, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1120, en Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 43 años.
